name: Reportable Incident Notified
description: Reportable AI incidents are notified to the supervisory authority.
rationale: IOSCO Table 6.6: timely, high-quality reporting; firms notify supervisors of significant AI failures, biases, cybersecurity events, data breaches, or incorrect outputs that meet the reportable threshold.

examples.fails: a reportable AI incident never notified to the regulator

source: IOSCO FR/02/2026 — Supervisory Toolkit for AI Use in Capital Markets (May 2026), Ch.3 Tables 5 (Disclosure) and 6 (Recordkeeping & reporting).
